calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Hall for Jason Calloway, Executor.

The Court noted that there were no objections made in court and inquired of the status on final distribution. Mr. Hall reported that his client received the fund in January, it was in form of a check sent out to his office, and since had opened an interest bearing account with Washington Mutual. He further reported that the $113,262.00 in the Conservatorship has been revised by 10%, and after fees are taken out from the balance, then the net amount to be divided by Rosalind and Jason Calloway. The Court noted of the differences of the wording in the Will. Matter is taken under submission, Proposed Order submitted in court and to be reviewed.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Continued To Apr-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
